LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.description: The 10mm Pistol is a semi-automatic sidearm chambered for 10mm rounds. Favored for its reliability and stopping power, it is a common sight among wastelanders and pre-war security forces alike.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.label: 10mm pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.description: An improved version of the classic 10mm Pistol, featuring enhanced reliability and accuracy. Favored by elite wastelanders and pre-war security forces.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.label: 10mm pistol MkII
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_10mm_Pistol_MkII.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.description: The 12.7mm Pistol is a heavy, semi-automatic sidearm chambered for 12.7mm rounds. Its immense stopping power and armor penetration make it a favorite among wasteland enforcers, but its weight and recoil require a strong hand.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.label: 12.7mm pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_127mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.description: The 14mm Pistol is a powerful sidearm chambered for 14mm rounds, offering exceptional stopping power and penetration. Rare and highly sought after in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.label: 14mm pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_14mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.description: The .223 Pistol is a unique sidearm chambered for .223 rifle rounds, offering high velocity and accuracy. Its design is favored by marksmen and collectors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.label: .223 pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_223_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.description: The 5.56mm Pistol is a rare, high-powered sidearm chambered for 5.56mm rifle rounds. Its unique design offers superior penetration and range compared to typical pistols, but with increased recoil and wear.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.label: 5.56mm pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_556_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.description: The 9mm Pistol is a lightweight, semi-automatic sidearm chambered for 9mm rounds. Its low recoil and plentiful ammunition make it a popular choice for both civilians and wastelanders, though it lacks the stopping power of larger calibers.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.label: 9mm pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_9mm_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.description: The Chinese Pistol is a compact, semi-automatic sidearm chambered for 9mm rounds. Manufactured before the Great War, it is lightweight and easy to conceal, but suffers from low stopping power and questionable reliability.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.label: chinese pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Chinese_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.description: The Colt 6520 is a classic pre-war sidearm, renowned for its reliability and ease of use. Chambered for .45 rounds, it remains a favorite among wasteland survivors.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.label: colt 6520
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Colt_6520_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.description: The Deagle is a massive, semi-automatic pistol chambered for .50 AE rounds. Its intimidating size and firepower make it a symbol of status and strength in the wasteland.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.label: deagle
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Deagle.tools.1.label: barrel
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_10mm_Pistol.description: The Silenced 10mm Pistol is a semi-automatic sidearm chambered for 10mm rounds and fitted with an integral suppressor. Favored by assassins and covert operatives, it offers a balance of stopping power and stealth.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_10mm_Pistol.label: silenced 10mm pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.description: The Silenced .22 Pistol is a lightweight, semi-automatic sidearm chambered for .22 LR rounds and equipped with an integral suppressor. Extremely quiet and easy to control, it is favored for stealth operations but lacks stopping power.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.label: silenced .22 pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.tools.0.label: grip
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Silenced_22_Pistol.tools.1.label: barrel
